message:
docs: update FEATURE_PARITY.md executive summary

- Fix TUI counts: 13 implemented (rich_rust + interactive), 1 partial, 3 missing
- Fix Authentication counts: 6 implemented, 1 partial, 1 missing
- Counts now match detailed sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
